ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the passenger */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Gender of the passenger (0 = male, 1 = female) */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the passenger */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Passenger class (1 = 1st class, 2 = 2nd class, 3 = 3rd class) */,
  "sibsp" INTEGER /* Number of siblings/spouses aboard */,
  "parch" INTEGER /* Number of parents/children aboard */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid by the passenger */,
  "embarked" INTEGER /* Port of Embarkation (0 = C = Cherbourg; 1 = Q = Queenstown; 2 = S = Southampton) */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Survival status (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "cabin_number" TEXT /* Cabin number of the passenger */,
  "deck" TEXT /* Deck where the cabin is located */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "has_family_on_board" INTEGER /* Whether the passenger has family on board */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_embarked FOREIGN KEY ("embarked") REFERENCES embarkation_ports ("port_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_pclass FOREIGN KEY ("pclass") REFERENCES passenger_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class (e.g., 1st Class, 2nd Class, 3rd Class) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "average_fare" REAL /* Average fare paid by passengers in this class */,
  "total_capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of this class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "embarkation_ports" (
  "port_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each port */,
  "port_name" TEXT /* Name of the port */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the port is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the port */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the port */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survival_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to passenger class */,
  "total_passengers" INTEGER /* Total number of passengers in this class */,
  "total_survivors" INTEGER /* Total number of survivors in this class */,
  "survival_rate" REAL /* Calculated survival rate as a percentage */,
  "mortality_rate" REAL /* Calculated mortality rate as a percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survival_statistics_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES passenger_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the document */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the passenger */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., historical record, image) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the document */,
  "uploader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_documents_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with this role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "resource_accessed" TEXT /* Resource accessed by the user (e.g., passenger data, analysis reports) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the note */,
  "note_content" TEXT /* Content of the research note */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the note was created */,
  "note_title" TEXT /* Title of the research note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., survival analysis, demographic breakdown) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the collaboration */,
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaborator */,
  "collaboration_date" TEXT /* Date the collaboration began */,
  "project_title" TEXT /* Title of the project being collaborated on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_collaborator_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaborator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report this visualization belongs to */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, graph, map) */,
  "visualization_content" TEXT /* Content of the visualization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the visualization was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES analysis_reports ("report_id")
)
